allow: Bash(python -c "from miniforge.core.backends.llama_cpp import LlamaCppBackend; print\('llama_cpp OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "from miniforge.models.registry import get_registry; r = get_registry\(\); info = r.get_model_info\('unsloth/MiniMax-M2.7-GGUF'\); print\(f'Registry OK: is_moe={info.is_moe}, params={info.params_billions}B'\)")
Bash(python -c "from miniforge.core.memory import MemoryManager; m = MemoryManager\(\); ctx = m.compute_moe_context\(61.0\); print\(f'Memory OK: computed n_ctx={ctx}'\)")
Bash(python -c "from miniforge.utils.config import M7Config; c = M7Config\(\); print\(f'Config OK: cache_k={c.cache_type_k}, quant={c.quantization}'\)")
